instruction: Change the output format from a list of `(value, count)` tuples to a flat list that interleaves values and counts: `[value1, count1, value2, count2, ...]`. The run-detection logic (grouping consecutive equal values) must remain unchanged; only the output representation changes. For example, `rle_encode([1, 1, 2, 3, 3])` must return `[1, 2, 2, 1, 3, 2]` instead of `[(1, 2), (2, 1), (3, 2)]`. Returns an empty list for empty input.
